title: Add rate limiting to public booking API
summary: Implement per-IP rate limits on POST /api/bookings and a clear 429 response with Retry-After.
changes: - Limit is configurable via environment variable
testPlan: Limit is configurable via environment variable
risks: Parent can spam the booking endpoint during peak registration. We need per-IP rate limits on POST /api/bookings and a clear 429 response with Retry-After.
ticketMapping: {"title":"DEV-142","summary":"Add rate limiting to public booking API","changes":["- POST /api/bookings returns 429 when limit exceeded","- Limit is configurable via environment variable"]}
